title: MobHunt
description: MobHunt: A Minecraft Fabric mod for Minecraft that forces you to kill a mob every X minutes or you die instantly. Perfect for hardcore worlds!
body:
☠ MobHunt Mod (Fabric) — Kill or Die!
A Minecraft Fabric mod for Minecraft that forces you to kill a mob every X minutes or you die instantly. Perfect for hardcore worlds!

⚔ How It Works
1. Join a world—you get a welcome message
2. Use /start [minutes] → X-minute timer starts
3. A countdown shows on your action bar (above hotbar) every second
4. Kill any mob (hostile OR passive) to reset the clock
5. Fail to kill in time → instant death!
